payload.subject: ACK scan-010 (T14) — all 3 findings confirmed applied
payload.summary: Scan-010 broadened scope beyond delta to cover high-traffic pages (why.astro, index.astro, about/index.astro, economic-landscape.mdx, gap/arguments.mdx). 3 findings identified across 3 files with files_with_findings=3. All applied prior to this explicit ACK. Delayed ACK remedies the gap in the session record.

f1.finding: Overstated worker protection gap — 'No enforceable framework protects workers displaced by automation' implied no protections exist (WARN Act, UI, TAA not acknowledged)
f1.resolution: Applied: changed to 'No enforceable framework guarantees the right to work for workers displaced by automation' — preserves ICESCR argument while acknowledging existing programs

f2.finding: Duplicate h2 heading '## The ICESCR Connection' at both line 116 and line 153 — creates ambiguous anchor links and confuses screen reader navigation
f2.resolution: Applied: second instance renamed to '## Why a Binding Framework Matters' (now at line 153)

f3.finding: Researcher variant cited Deloitte 34/30/37 adoption data without hyperlink
f3.resolution: Applied: Deloitte link added pointing to deloitte.com state-of-ai-in-the-enterprise with rel=noopener

payload.session_note: Broadened scan scope (gap/arguments.mdx, about/index.astro) scanned clean — strong fair witness compliance. 9 consecutive findings accepted through scan-007 confirmed by psychology's disposition note. Scan-010 continues healthy convergence pattern. Awaiting scan-011.

pr_status.note: No PR required — all findings were already applied. ACK delivered via PR to psychology repo.

claims.text: All 3 scan-010 findings have been applied to the codebase prior to this ACK
claims.confidence_basis: Direct file inspection of why.astro, economic-landscape.mdx, and index.astro confirms all three fixes are present

action_gate.gate_note: Awaiting scan-011 to continue quality loop
